business.name: KVA Landscaping LLC
business.parentCompany: JVA Home Care LLC (sibling brands: JVA House Cleaner LLC, KVA Landscaping LLC)
business.license: Class A contractor, licensed under Virginia law
business.about:
JVA Home Care is an insured company licensed under Virginia law as a Class A contractor.

JVA Home Care LLC, JVA House Cleaner LLC, and kVA Landscaping LLC are managed by Victor Amaya. He is a contractor class A licensed in Virginia, he identified himself as an entrepreneur providing work to the Herndon, Sterling, and Leesburg VA Communities.

Everything started as a dream now we are available to provide addition and renovation services for 15 miles around Sterling VA, Landscaping services for 10 miles, and cleaning services for 30 miles.

Victor Amaya is responsible to make sure every department is running professionally and efficiently.

servicesOffered.name: Sprinkler and Irrigation System Repair and Maintenance

faqs.question: What should the customer know about your pricing (e.g., discounts, fees)?
What is your typical process for working with a new customer?
faqs.answer: Customer will contact me and if I’m available to get a Idea what they need we can set up a price or go to the customer home to give a free estimate

faqs.question: What education and/or training do you have that relates to your work?
How did you get started doing this type of work?
faqs.answer: I started working for another landscaping company in sterling VA

faqs.question: What types of customers have you worked with?
faqs.answer: Every week, every two weeks, one time only

faqs.question: Describe a recent project you are fond of. How long did it take?
faqs.answer:
We just finished a big project in Germantown MD was a sidewalk, stairs, patio and fire pit
Flagstones, paver, rocks and concrete

faqs.question: What advice would you give a customer looking to hire a provider in your area of work?
faqs.answer: Reviews will tell the truth about a business

faqs.question: What questions should customers think through before talking to professionals about their project?
faqs.answer: How soon they will need the service done and what the customer is expecting from us

reviews.author: Brian J.
reviews.text: This team is awesome. They were wide eyed at how bad our weeds had gotten, but handled it really well and now our yard is completely clear and looks great. I’ll be going back to them for future work.
reviews.details: Details: Residential • Medium (1,000 - 5,000 sq ft) • Over a month ago • No, I prefer no herbicides to be used • No, I don't need to be there • Only one time

reviews.author: Frances N.
reviews.text:
The KVA team listened to my lawn needs and worked together to mulch my shrub and flower beds.  They provided superior quality work at a fair price.  I have not had such diligent workers who took the same care and pride with my yard as we did when we were able. 

After planting my skip laurel shrubs one of the team members watered the shrubs.  I was so thankful. He weeded before mulching and edged the beds to give a manicured look. 

My husband and I were so pleased to find this team.  We will definitely use them again.
reviews.details: Details: Once a week • Residential • 5,000 - 10,000 sq ft (0.11-0.23 acres) • Mowing, trimming, and edging • Standard grass (under 6 inches) • Yes, I must be present

reviews.author: Annette G.
reviews.text: They responded quickly to my inquiry and were responsive to my questions. They kept me posted on the scheduling and did a very nice job. I hired them for ongoing lawn mowing.
reviews.details: Details: Once a month • Residential • Less than 1,000 sq ft (<0.02 acres) • Mowing, trimming, and edging • Weeding and prevention • Standard grass (under 6 inches) • No, I don't need to be there

reviews.author: Wendy W.
reviews.text: I’m so glad that we chose KVA for our weeding and bush trimming. They did an excellent job with the completion of our yard. They were very responsive We will be calling this company again.
reviews.details: Details: Residential • Medium (1,000 - 5,000 sq ft) • 3-4 weeks ago • No, I prefer no herbicides to be used • No, I don't need to be there • Only one time

reviews.author: Martina A.
reviews.text: We didn’t have the energy or time to tackle our flower beds. I reached out to KVA Landscaping and they responded right away. My yard looks great. I’m planning to get my backyard done soon. Thanks KVA Landscaping 😀
reviews.details: Details: Residential • Yes, I will provide the mulch • Medium (500-1000 sq ft) • No, I will need the professional to prep the area for me • I applied mulch to this area over a year ago
